'''Nightseers''' were [[Bird/Legends|birds]] that were genetically engineered by food corporations to be silent and wingless. They were raised on [[Ruan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
